archetype.name: Exorcist
archetype.note: This archetype offers Sense the Unseen at a different level than displayed here.

archetype.name: Shadowdancer
archetype.note: This archetype offers Sense the Unseen at a different level than displayed here.

feat.name: Sense the Unseen
feat.text: When you look for foes, you can catch even the slightest cues, such as their minute movements or the shifting of air currents on your skin. Even though you failed at the triggering check, you automatically sense any undetected creatures in the area where you’re Seeking, making them merely hidden to you.

traits.name: Investigator
traits.text: This trait indicates abilities from the investigator class.

traits.name: Ranger
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the ranger class.

traits.name: Rogue
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the rogue class.

feat.trigger: You fail a check to Seek

sections.name: Archetype Use
sections.text: This feat can be used for one or more archetypes in addition to the listed classes. When selected this way, the feat does not have its class traits.
